blocks.content: Before giving an AI agent the keys to your terminal, we must establish our workspace. Please review the course materials and ensure your environment is pre-provisioned.

items: **Target Environment:** A Google-internal Cloudtop Linux VM is **mandatory** for this workshop. Ensure it is provisioned and active before proceeding.
**Accounts:** A personal, non-google.com gMail account is required to sign in to Antigravity and manage your secure token entitlements.
